summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of GCSE Maths question search tool UI revamp. All core functionality, responsive design, and user interactions working correctly.
passed_tests: Landing page renders correctly with 'Find similar questions' heading
Search bar visible and accepts text input
Paperclip upload button present and functional
Desktop sidebar shows all required buttons (Filters, Pen, Eraser, Undo, Clear, Make Worksheet, Request Features)
Sidebar collapse/expand toggle works correctly
Filter modal opens with Level, Calculator, Number of Matches fields
Filter modal dropdowns and input fields work correctly
Filter modal can be closed via close button and apply button
Make Worksheet button toggles worksheet panel correctly
Worksheet panel shows download options (correctly disabled when no questions selected)
Request Features button toggles feedback form
Feedback form has email and message fields that accept input
Mobile responsive design works correctly
Hamburger menu appears and functions on mobile viewport
Mobile sidebar drawer opens/closes correctly
All required buttons accessible in mobile sidebar
Desktop sidebar correctly hidden on mobile
All required data-testid attributes present for testing
Annotation tools (Pen, Eraser, Undo, Clear) interactive and functional
Clear annotation confirmation modal works
No console errors on page load
Clean Apple-like minimal design implemented
Proper light theme applied throughout
